---
name: Preset Request
about: Suggest a new visual style preset
title: "[Preset] "
labels: enhancement, preset
assignees: ''
---

## Preset Name

Give your preset a short, descriptive name (e.g., "Neon Minimalist", "Japanese Zen")

## Vibe / References

Describe the aesthetic in 2-3 sentences. Reference specific brands, websites, or design movements.

**Example brands/sites that capture this vibe:**
- 
- 
- 

## Suggested Font Pairing

- **Headline font:** (must be on Google Fonts)
- **Body font:** (must be on Google Fonts)

## Color Direction

- **Background tone:** (e.g., warm off-white, deep navy, pure black)
- **Primary color:** (e.g., electric blue, forest green)
- **Accent color:** (e.g., coral, gold)

## Animation Character

How should things move? (e.g., "smooth and slow like water", "snappy and precise", "bouncy and playful")

## Why This Preset?

What gap does it fill that the existing 10 presets don't cover?

## Screenshots / Inspiration (Optional)

Add any reference images or links that capture the aesthetic.
